creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
Denise H. G. wrote:
> seahorse-agent is in security/seahorse-plugins.
>
>
>   
Then why doesn't portupgrade or portinstall want to deal with it?  
Portupgrade refuses to acknowledge that the port exists unless I put the 
directory name in front of it, and even then it will not do anything at 
all to install it.  Portinstall behaves the same way, except that if I 
put the directory name in front, it tries to collect depenedency 
information, but then stops with no messages.

There is somehting wrong here, but I cannnot tell what.

/Joe
